def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # sign(delta(volume, 1))
    sign_delta_volume = delta(pl.col('volume'), periods=1).sign()

    # -1 * delta(close, 1)
    neg_delta_close = -1 * delta(pl.col('close'), periods=1)

    # Combined factor
    factor = sign_delta_volume * neg_delta_close

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
